'''Bal Jaset''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] and was the [[High Lord]] of [[House Melantha]].

==Biography==
Originally, Jaset had served as a Privy Councilor to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], though he was generally not considered a member of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Inner Circle]]. In [[7 BBY/Legends|7 BBY]], Jaset assumed his post as Lord of House Melantha. Because of his close relationship with [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]], he was able to get a great deal of support from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and brought Melantha to a position of prominence over [[House Mecetti]].

In addition to his support of the Empire, Jaset was also a known womanizer. During his time as High Lord, he sired at least thirty illegitimate children, as well as taken on an uncounted number of mistresses.

{{Char-stub}}
